app.name: shadcn-ui/ui
app.one_liner: A customizable, open-source UI component library built on Radix UI and Tailwind CSS for building custom design systems.

screens.name: Component Library Overview
screens.purpose: Display available UI components and customization options for developers to integrate and extend.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a customized UI component configuration to the project.

mvp_plan: week 1: Set up base component scaffolding
acceptance_tests: Mobile navigation in Next.js App Router does not trigger unintended Sheet/Dialog reopen/close behavior.
Sidebar component integrates correctly with Radix UI without runtime errors.
